title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the architecture and orchestration framework surrounding an AI coding agent model. It operates at two levels: the AI layer handling rules, skills, hooks, and subagents within a session, and the orchestration layer managing multiple specialized agent sessions into scalable workflows. Cole Medin emphasizes that the harness comprises roughly 98% of production systems like Claude Code, while the underlying model is a smaller component.
